reviews.review_description: Independent user here: BaselineZ uniquely integrates digital outcrop models with core data and subsurface geological models. Seamless data transfer from industry-leading 3D modeling tools combined with public 3D data sources enables you to create an online geoscience & engineering collaboration experience that will be of immediate value to co-workers, operational partners, managers, and students. The Meta Quest 2 experience is amazing and the large number of additional collaboration clients (iPhone, iPad, Android, MS Hololens, PC) make this a very well-designed solution for the Energy finders serving our industry.
